dct_title_s: Geologic map of the Salisbury Potrero quadrangle, Santa Barbara County, California
dct_description_sm: by A. Eugene Fritsche & Thomas W. Dibblee, Jr. ; edited by John A. Minch.
Relief shown by contours and spot heights.
"Topographic base map from available USGS 7.5-minute quadrangle Salisbury Portero, CA 1964. AMS 2053 I SW-- Series V895."
Includes quadrangle location map, index to adjacent 7.5 minute quadrangles, and index to sources of geology, most recent 1971.
dct_publisher_sm: Santa Barbara Museum of Natural History
